title: Copper Pistons
description: Changes some redstone-related recipes to include copper
body:
Changes the recipes for
 - Comparator
 - Daylight sensor
 - Dispenser
 - Dropper
 - Observer
 - Redstone lamp
 - Repeater
 - Piston

...to use copper instead of stone.

There's also a resource pack that reflects these changes on the blocks.
